response.global_summary: The video is an announcement live stream by VTuber Hoshimachi Suisei, where she discusses her 8th anniversary goods, concert Blu-ray releases, and announces a new original song titled 'Primadonna'. The video concludes with a vocal performance of this new song.

scenes.description: Hoshimachi Suisei talks about her 8th anniversary goods and concert Blu-ray releases.
Hoshimachi Suisei performs her new original song 'Primadonna'.
